baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: DATS exhibits severe data insufficiency across fundamentals, news, and sentiment layers. Valuation metrics are distorted (negative PE, massive P/S, negative ROA/ROE) indicating unprofitable/distressed state. Macro regime is Strengthening/Moderately Restrictive with strict equity discipline. Wikipedia pageviews show modest attention (3–17 views/day, peak 17 on 2025-03-20) with no corroborating catalyst. No news items, no SEC filings, no sentiment data. Alternative data is sparse (Wikipedia only; all industry adapters disconnected). Information integrity assessment flags low-tier-only evidence with uncorroborated status. Fundamental snapshot is null (insufficient_evidence). Without primary sources, catalyst confirmation, or credible fundamentals, neither surge_short nor quality_long sleeve conditions can be met. Fail-closed per rule §13.4.
risk_flags: No fundamental data available (snapshot_quarter all null)
No news catalyst within decision window
No SEC filings retrievable (CIK not found)
No sentiment/ownership data (adapters not connected or failed)
Wikipedia pageviews only alt-data source; low-tier evidence
Lookahead data present in corporate_calendar (earnings dropped post-cutoff)
suggested_improvements: Retrieve SEC filings (8-K, 10-Q, 10-K) to establish CIK and fundamental anchor
Obtain analyst sentiment and news coverage from T1/T2 sources
Verify ticker mapping in GitHub and industry-specific adapters
Establish whether DATS is a micro-cap or delisted entity
Collect institutional ownership and insider trading data
Confirm macro regime allocation constraints before any equity decision

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: v1 generator does not populate narrative_price_gap_assessment or sentiment_community_ownership_evidence with LLM reasoning; these blocks remain skeleton placeholders. Information_integrity_assessment pollution-defense layer unimplemented (fail-closed per schema v1.1 decision #8). No upstream agent outputs available in baseline_solo mode; all reasoning is direct from evidence packet.
recommended_followups: Escalate to data ops: verify DATS ticker validity and SEC CIK status
If DATS is a micro-cap or OTC, confirm exchange and reporting requirements
Retry FMP sentiment endpoints with higher-tier plan or alternative provider
Collect 13F/Form 4 data from SEC EDGAR directly if CIK becomes available
Monitor Wikipedia pageviews for sustained attention spike (currently baseline ~6–12 views/day)
Defer decision until fundamental snapshot and news catalyst are available
baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence across fundamentals, news, sentiment, and filing layers. Negative profitability, distorted valuation, zero news catalyst, and low-tier-only alt-data (Wikipedia) prevent both surge_short and quality_long sleeve qualification. Macro regime enforces strict_quality_and_valuation discipline. Information integrity assessment flags uncorroborated status. Fail-closed per rule §13.4.
risk_notes: Fundamental snapshot is null (status=insufficient_evidence); cannot assess earnings quality or balance-sheet health
Valuation inputs are TTM-based, not PIT-safe; PE, ROA, ROE all negative, indicating distressed/unprofitable state
No news items within decision window; no catalyst identified
Alternative data limited to Wikipedia pageviews (low-tier); all industry-specific adapters disconnected
SEC filings unavailable (CIK not found); cannot verify corporate structure or insider activity
Sentiment and ownership data not evaluated; no institutional or insider positioning data
Macro regime: Strengthening/Moderately Restrictive with equity_allocation_cap=30% and strict_quality_and_valuation discipline
Information integrity assessment: low_tier_only evidence, uncorroborated, pollution_risk=unknown, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false
Lookahead data present in corporate_calendar (4 earnings events dropped post-cutoff); PIT safety maintained but limits forward guidance
Wikipedia pageviews show modest attention (peak 17 on 2025-03-20, baseline 6–12); no abnormal retail attention or meme flag

rule_engine_path: 3. Assess fundamental_snapshot: status=insufficient_evidence, all snapshot_quarter fields null → VETO: missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance
4. Assess news_event_summary: items_count=0 (20 dropped post-cutoff), no catalyst identified → VETO: insufficient_evidence
5. Assess valuation_snapshot: PE=-3.12, P/S=15253, ROA=-36.2%, ROE=-30.7%, EV/EBITDA=-1.46 → distressed/unprofitable, TTM not PIT-safe
6. Assess alternative_data_features: Wikipedia pageviews only (low-tier), all industry adapters disconnected, github_public unmapped, fmp_sentiment empty
7. Assess information_integrity_assessment: low_tier_only, uncorroborated, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false → VETO: information_integrity_veto
8. Assess sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: status=not_evaluated, all sub-blocks not_evaluated or data_unavailable
9. Assess filing_confirmation: status=not_evaluated, sec_edgar cik_not_found, sec_form4 cik_not_found
10. Candidate_type=surge_short: requires surge-short v0.4 sleeve conditions (distressed catalyst + corroboration + macro fit). Catalyst absent, corroboration absent, macro discipline strict. FAIL.
11. Candidate_type=quality_long: requires quality_long thresholds (profitable, positive FCF, reasonable valuation, institutional support). All negative. FAIL.
12. Three vetos tripped: insufficient_evidence, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance, information_integrity_veto → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0
decision_log: T+1: Macro regime read: Strengthening/Moderately Restrictive, stress_score=1, equity_allocation_cap=30%, equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation
T+2: Fundamental snapshot status=insufficient_evidence; all snapshot_quarter fields null; no income/balance/cashflow rows available
T+3: Valuation snapshot: PE=-3.12 (negative), P/S=15253 (extreme), ROA=-36.2% (negative), ROE=-30.7% (negative), EV/EBITDA=-1.46 (negative) → distressed state
T+4: News event summary: items_count=0 (20 dropped post-cutoff); polygon_news returned 0 rows; no catalyst identified
T+5: Alternative data: Wikipedia pageviews only (low-tier); peak 17 views on 2025-03-20, baseline 6–12 views/day; no abnormal attention
T+6: Alternative data: sec_edgar cik_not_found, sec_form4 cik_not_found, github_public unmapped_ticker, fmp_sentiment all_endpoints_empty, sec_13f not_available_on_current_plan
T+7: Information integrity assessment: low_tier_only evidence, uncorroborated, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false, pollution_risk_level=unknown
T+8: Sentiment/community/ownership: status=not_evaluated; fmp_sentiment data_unavailable; sec_13f data_unavailable; sec_form4 data_unavailable
T+9: Filing confirmation: status=not_evaluated; sec_edgar cik_not_found; no 8-K or press release confirmation

T+10: Candidate_type surge_short evaluation: requires distressed catalyst + corroboration + macro fit. Catalyst absent (no news), corroboration absent (low-tier only), macro discipline strict. FAIL surge_short.

T+11: Candidate_type quality_long evaluation: requires profitable fundamentals + positive FCF + reasonable valuation + institutional support. All metrics negative, no fundamentals, no ownership data. FAIL quality_long.

T+12: Veto evaluation: insufficient_evidence (tripped), hard_risk_limit_breached (not tripped), missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance (tripped), information_integrity_veto (tripped), lookahead_data_used (not tripped)
T+13: Decision: no_trade (fail-closed due to three vetos); position_size_pct=0.0; execution_plan.side=none
